moments.title: The Hundred 2026 Kicks Off Today
moments.blurb: The Hundred, the action-packed 100-ball cricket competition, begins its 2026 season today, July 21st, with MI London taking on Sunrisers Leeds.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for some serious summer cricket! The Hundred is back, bringing fast-paced action to grounds around the UK from today. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Local Teams
angles.copy: London Spirit fans, it's time! The Hundred 2026 season is underway. Will this be our year to lift the trophy?

angles.name: Welsh Team Focus
angles.copy: The Welsh Fire are ready to light up The Hundred! The 100-ball tournament kicks off this week. Let's get behind our team!

moments.title: Latitude Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from Thursday 23rd to Sunday 26th July, with headliners like David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Who's heading to Latitude Festival this weekend? David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi are among the big names ready to take the stage in Suffolk!

angles.name: Suffolk Local Angle
angles.copy: It's almost time! Latitude Festival takes over Henham Park from Thursday. Traffic updates and all the festival buzz coming your way on Nation Radio Suffolk!

angles.name: Headliner Focus
angles.copy: From David Byrne's unique show to Lewis Capaldi's return, Latitude is stacked! Which headliner are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Cat Stevens Turns 78 Today
moments.blurb: Legendary British singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday today, July 21st.

angles.name: General Birthday Wish
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the iconic Cat Stevens, aka Yusuf Islam! What's your go-to track from his incredible catalogue?

angles.name: Song Focus
angles.copy: 'Father and Son', 'Wild World', 'Morning Has Broken'... Cat Stevens gave us so many timeless songs. Celebrating his 78th today!

moments.title: Don Henley Turns 79 Tomorrow
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and drumming legend Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Focus
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating the 79th birthday of Eagles legend Don Henley! From 'Hotel California' to 'Boys of Summer', what's your favourite Henley moment?

angles.name: Solo Career
angles.copy: Happy almost birthday to Don Henley! Beyond The Eagles, his solo career brought us 'The Boys of Summer' and more. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Slash Turns 61 on Thursday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitar icon Slash (Saul Hudson) celebrates his 61st birthday on July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: This Thursday, the one and only Slash turns 61! The guitar legend behind Guns N' Roses' biggest riffs. What's your favourite Slash solo?

angles.name: Guns N' Roses
angles.copy: From 'Sweet Child o' Mine' to 'November Rain', Slash's guitar work is legendary. Celebrating his 61st birthday on Thursday!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez Turns 57 on Friday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24th.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 this Friday. What's your ultimate J.Lo party anthem?

angles.name: Music & Movies
angles.copy: From 'Jenny from the Block' to Hollywood blockbusters, Jennifer Lopez does it all! Wishing her a very happy 57th birthday this Friday.

moments.title: Mick Jagger Turns 83 on Sunday
moments.blurb: Rolling Stones frontman and rock legend Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday! The ultimate rock 'n' roll frontman, still going strong. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Enduring Energy
angles.copy: 83 years young and still performing with incredible energy! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger this Sunday. What a career!

moments.title: Soulja Boy Turns 36 Next Tuesday
moments.blurb: Rapper and producer Soulja Boy, known for 'Crank That (Soulja Boy)', celebrates his 36th birthday on July 28th.

angles.name: Throwback Hit
angles.copy: It's a big week for birthdays! Rapper Soulja Boy turns 36 next Tuesday. Remember 'Crank That'? What a moment!

angles.name: Early Influencer
angles.copy: From viral dance crazes to chart-topping hits, Soulja Boy was a pioneer. Wishing him a happy 36th birthday next Tuesday!

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin for Many
moments.blurb: Schools across the UK are breaking up this week, marking the official start of the long summer holidays for many families.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: The school gates are closing for summer! Who's ready for six weeks of fun, sun, and maybe a little chaos? Happy summer holidays everyone!

angles.name: Travel Prep
angles.copy: School's out! If you're hitting the roads for your summer getaway this week, make sure you're tuned in for traffic and travel updates.

angles.name: Welsh Schools Out
angles.copy: Ysgolion allan! Schools across Wales are breaking up this week for the summer holidays. Have a fantastic break, everyone!

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Latest
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart was updated last Friday, with [Artist Name] holding strong at number one for another week with '[Song Title]'.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still at number one! [Artist Name] is dominating the Official UK Singles Chart for another week with '[Song Title]'. Are you still obsessed?

angles.name: New Entry/Mover
angles.copy: Big news on the Official UK Singles Chart! [Artist Name] has climbed to number [position] with '[Song Title]'. What a tune!

moments.title: Love Island UK Final Approaches
moments.blurb: The Love Island UK final is set to air on Monday, July 27th, bringing the popular reality series to a dramatic close.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: The Love Island UK final is just around the corner on Monday! Who do you think will be crowned the winners and take home the £50k?

angles.name: Fan Theories
angles.copy: With the Love Island final approaching, the villa drama is peaking! What are your wildest predictions for the last few days?
